name: LLM-evaluation-framework
hook: an LLM eval framework where quality isn't one number. deterministic rules, stakeholder personas, LLM-as-judge. yaml in, html out, CI gates the whole thing.

for.builder: drop yaml suites in, ship html reports out
for.ops: wire CI to fail on regression, not vibes
for.hiring: evidence of eval discipline before it was a trend

name: chip-supply-chain-map

name: procurement-negotiation-lab
hook: flagship interactive demo. an 8-level walkthrough of mechanism design for long-lead procurement: coordination gap, info trade-offs, walkaway zones, ADMM, VCG, multi-party splits, audits, and an authoring sandbox. cross-platform engine; mobile app on the way.

for.student: play levels 1-11; the math gets named in plain English
for.domain: see VCG, ADMM, audits as procurement levers, not theorems
for.science: mechanism-design pedagogy with the failure modes named
for.builder: fork the engine; the authoring sandbox is the demo
for.hiring: evidence of teaching-by-shipping over slide-deck depth

name: ai-field-brief
